name_cn:
Genuine leather
Puzzle Edge Handbag Latest version with adjustable strap
Fennel Green
Lo*we🔥's debut tote*The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create Puzzle's unique geometric lines*This mini version is made of satin calfskin with cage-stitched edges🌟
The mini Puzzle can hold, for example, a small vertical wallet, most size phones (max 6.1 inches), and sunglasses case. Shoulder or crossbody*Adjustable, detachable strap*Zipper closure, calfskin zipper pull*Herringbone cotton canvas lining with Anagram embossing🌟
size:18*12.5*8CM
Model:3000b
